pattern: DP from the end of the array: at each index the current player optimally chooses 1, 2, or 3 stones to maximize their own score minus the opponent's future score.
hints: Define dp[i] as the maximum score advantage the current player can achieve from position i onward (own score minus opponent's).
From position i, try taking 1, 2, or 3 stones: the gain is sum(stoneValue[i:i+k]) minus what the opponent will achieve from i+k.
dp[i] = max over k in {1,2,3} of (sum(stoneValue[i:i+k]) - dp[i+k]); compare dp[0] to 0 to get the winner.

edge_inputs.description: single stone, Alice takes it and wins
example 2: Alice wins with all three
all negative, Alice forced to take least damage
all same value, result depends on length parity
